revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八幡大神宮]]
'''Hachiman Daijingū''' (八幡大神宮)
* {{ill|Hachiman Daijingū (Osaka City)|ja|八幡大神宮 (大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Daijingū (Osaka City)|1=Hachiman Daijingū (Osaka)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q58213337}} - Located in {{ill|Asahi Ward|ja|旭区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Ward|1=Asahi-ku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q840767}}, {{ill|Osaka|en|Osaka|qid=Q35765|lt=Osaka City|1=Osaka}}, {{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka Prefecture|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Makiokachi Hachiman-gū|ja|牧落八幡宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Makiokachi Hachiman-gū|1=Makiochi Hachimangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11570502}} - Located in {{ill|Minoh|en|Minoh|qid=Q665097|lt=Minoh City|1=Minoh}}, Osaka Prefecture. Its registered corporate name is Hachiman Daijingū.
== Related Items == * {{ill|Hachiman shrine|en|Hachiman shrine|qid=Q11390939|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine}}
{{disambiguation}}
